title: Municipality to host information session on Aalwyndal Biodiversity Offset Investigation
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality will be hosting a public information session on the Aalwyndal Biodiversity Offset Investigation at the Mossel Bay Town Hall at 18:00 tonight, 16 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality will be hosting a public information session on the Aalwyndal Biodiversity Offset Investigation at the Mossel Bay Town Hall at 18:00 tonight, 16 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The session will also be streamed live and can be watched here: https://www.facebook.com/mosselbaymun","html":"The session will also be streamed live and can be watched here: https://www.facebook.com/mosselbaymun"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"A Facebook post by the municipality said that due to the time constraints of tonight's meeting, live streaming will be closed to comments."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you have any written comments, you can submit them to the Mossel Bay Municipal Manager, Colin Puren at PO Box 25, Mossel Bay, 6500 or email [email protected] on or before 30 September, for attention of Jaco Roux, the municipality's town planning manager.","html":"If you have any written comments, you can submit them to the Mossel Bay Municipal Manager, Colin Puren at PO Box 25, Mossel Bay, 6500 or email [email protected] on or before 30 September, for attention of Jaco Roux, the municipality's town planning manager."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Comments must quote your, name, address and contact details, interest in the matter and motivation. Enquiries can be made to Roux at 044 606 5071 or [email protected]","html":"Comments must quote your, name, address and contact details, interest in the matter and motivation. Enquiries can be made to Roux at 044 606 5071 or [email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Any person who cannot write will be assisted by a municipal official by transcribing their comments.","html":"Any person who cannot write will be assisted by a municipal official by transcribing their comments."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Aalwyndal development: Biodiversity study released","Aalwyndal Development: Residents seek clarity, dates","Development of Aalwyndal: Certain areas 'highly sensitive'"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Municipality to host information session on Aalwyndal Biodiversity Offset Investigation
